recentSessions.title: Windows Environment Setup
recentSessions.summary: DOE health check on new Windows machine. Installed Node.js 24.14.0 and bootstrapped Python 3.14.3. Fixed git hooks for Windows compatibility (sed -i and PYTHONIOENCODING). All 5 DOE checks pass, audit clean.

recentSessions.title: Booking Flow Build
recentSessions.summary: Scoped and built all 6 steps of Feature 4 (Booking Flow): UI primitives, booking data helpers, modal shell with space selector, date/time picker with availability, guest count and price summary, booking confirmation with instant/manual paths, back navigation, mobile responsive. All 24 auto contracts passed. Feature shipped at v0.4.5.

recentSessions.title: Listing Detail Build
recentSessions.summary: Scoped and built all 6 steps of Feature 3 (Listing Detail): photo gallery with lightbox, property header, amenities grid, space cards with pricing, reviews section, and full page assembly. All 29 contracts (18 auto + 11 manual) passed. Feature shipped at v0.3.5.

recentSessions.title: Search & Discovery Build
recentSessions.summary: Scoped and built all 6 steps of Feature 2 (Search & Discovery): data layer, property cards, filter bar with URL sync, map panel, split-view integration, SSR polish. Fixed server/client boundary error. All 35 auto contracts passed.

recentSessions.title: Full Scaffold Build
recentSessions.summary: Built all 5 steps of Feature 1: Next.js 15 + Tailwind + shadcn/ui scaffold, design system tokens, layout shell with collapsible sidebar, 26-entity TypeScript types with fixtures, 21 placeholder pages. Updated brand to actual Workabout palette (indigo/terracotta, Barlow/Inter). Fixed topbar overlap and hydration error. All contracts passed.

recentSessions.title: Project Planning
recentSessions.summary: Reviewed v1 platform blueprint, defined tech stack and 10-feature roadmap, wrote detailed scaffold plan with contracts.
